targets.expr:
# 1. sum over time the number of alerts
# 2. count the alerts by hosts
# 3. count the number of hosts that we have alerts on

count (count (sum_over_time (habana_bmc_alerts{hostname=~"$hostname"}[$__range])) by (oam, hostname))

panels.description:
Number of supported lanes
GAUDI1- 20
GAUDI2- 48
GAUDI3- 48
panels.title: Ethernet Info - Number Of Lanes

panels.description:
Number of supported links
GAUDI1- 10
GAUDI2- 48
GAUDI3- 24/48
panels.title: Ethernet Info - Number Of Links

targets.expr:
sum(
# change link label to be port
((label_replace(habana_bmc_ethernet_status_external_link_status{hostname=~"$hostname"},"port","$1","link","(.*)"))

# join with the external ports
* on(port,oam)
group_right(type) habana_bmc_ethernet_status_port_mapping{type=~"External .*",hostname=~"$hostname"})) by (oam)

panels.title: Ethernet Status - Link Retraining Due To BER
